/usr/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/countdown-source.dir/objects.a
/usr/bin/ar qc CMakeFiles/countdown-source.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/countdown-source.dir/objects1.rsp
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++ -shared -o countdown-source.dll -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/countdown-source.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles/countdown-source.dir/linkLibs.rsp
